_meta.description: All 110 agents at full capacity — no tier restrictions

sales.rationale: GPT-4o excels at persuasive, human-like copy

analytics.rationale: Claude excels at long-context data analysis

research.rationale: Claude excels at long-context research synthesis

general.rationale: Local Ollama for privacy-preserving general tasks

orchestrator.description: Master Orchestrator — routes tasks to specialist agents and coordinates multi-agent workflows

task-orchestrator.description: Task Orchestrator — durable planner and multi-agent coordinator for enterprise upgrade missions, task decomposition, agent dispatch, budget checks, progress tracking, and result synthesis

lead-hunter.description: B2B Lead Generation Specialist — finds decision makers, emails, and qualifies leads

content-master.description: SEO Content Specialist — writes 2000+ word optimized articles with proper structure

social-guru.description: Social Media Manager — finds viral content, writes engaging captions, generates hashtags

intel-agent.description: Competitive Intelligence Analyst — monitors competitors: pricing, features, reviews, traffic

product-scout.description: E-commerce Product Researcher — finds arbitrage opportunities, trending products, validates suppliers

email-ninja.description: Cold Email Specialist — builds sequences, personalizes at scale, optimizes deliverability

support-bot.description: E-commerce Support Bot — 24/7 customer service agent that classifies tickets, auto-resolves 90% of cases (refunds, tracking, FAQs) and escalates the rest

data-analyst.description: Market Research Analyst — analyzes trends, generates SWOT, creates reports with data

creative-studio.description: Creative Director — design briefs, image prompts, brand voice, ad copy

crypto-trader.description: Crypto Trading Analyst — technical analysis, patterns, risk assessment with confidence scores

bot-dev.description: Trading Bot Developer — code review, feature implementation, optimization. Security-first

web-sales.description: Web Analysis & Sales Specialist — UX/SEO audits, find contacts, write personalized pitches

company-builder.description: Company Builder — builds companies from scratch with simulations, business plans, and GTM strategy

memecoin-creator.description: Memecoin & Token Creator — full token launch from concept, tokenomics to viral community strategy

hr-manager.description: HR Manager — full hiring pipeline, onboarding, org design, and culture building

finance-wizard.description: Finance Wizard — P&L modeling, investor pitch financials, revenue models, and fundraising prep

brand-strategist.description: Brand Strategist — brand naming, identity systems, positioning, voice, and messaging frameworks

growth-hacker.description: Growth Hacker — viral loops, funnel optimization, A/B tests, retention, and product-led growth

project-manager.description: Project Manager — sprint planning, milestones, risk registers, Gantt charts, and team coordination

order-processor.description: E-commerce Order Processor — listens for new orders via webhook, validates payment, places supplier orders, and notifies customers with tracking info

bookkeeper.description: AI Bookkeeper — pulls Stripe/PayPal transaction data, categorises expenses, generates P&L reports, and prepares quarterly tax exports
specialties: COGS vs Ads vs Shipping split

inventory-sync.description: Inventory Sync Agent — monitors supplier stock levels, forecasts demand using 7-day sales averages, and triggers auto-reorders before stockouts

email-marketer.description: Email Marketing Agent — segments customers (new/abandoned-cart/repeat), generates personalised GPT-powered email copy, runs A/B tests on subject lines, and sends via Mailchimp

social-poster.description: Social Media Poster — generates viral content scripts and images, schedules posts across Instagram/TikTok/Twitter at peak engagement times, and auto-replies to early comments

product-researcher.description: Product Researcher — scans TikTok trends and Amazon bestsellers daily, validates demand via Google Trends / JungleScout scoring, writes GPT-powered listings, and auto-publishes to Shopify

ecom-dashboard.description: E-commerce Dashboard Agent — aggregates real-time metrics (revenue, profit margin, orders, top products) from Stripe + Shopify and surfaces alerts for anomalies

lead-hunter-elite.description: Lead Hunter Elite — advanced B2B lead hunting with ICP definition, LinkedIn/web scraping simulation, email pattern guessing, and scored prospect lists with outreach-ready profiles

cold-outreach-assassin.description: ColdOutreachAssassin — builds and executes multi-channel cold sequences (email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) with A/B testing and automated follow-up tracking

sales-closer-pro.description: SalesCloserPro — handles negotiations, objection handling and deal closing via chat/email/call scripts using SPIN, Challenger, and MEDDIC frameworks

linkedin-growth-hacker.description: LinkedInGrowthHacker — LinkedIn profile optimization, connection campaigns, and viral content creation for B2B lead attraction and brand building

ad-campaign-wizard.description: AdCampaignWizard — designs, launches and optimizes paid ads (Meta/Google/LinkedIn) with ROAS prediction, creative briefs, and budget allocation

referral-rocket.description: ReferralRocket — builds automated referral programs with incentive calculation, tracking mechanics, and viral sharing copy that turns customers into ambassadors

partnership-matchmaker.description: PartnershipMatchmaker — finds and pitches JV/partnership opportunities with partner scoring, pitch deck generation, and deal structure templates

conversion-rate-optimizer.description: ConversionRateOptimizer — analyzes funnels, designs A/B tests, and provides CRO recommendations to increase conversion rates across landing pages and sales funnels

engineering-assistant.description: Engineering Assistant — full-stack software engineering help: frontend (React/Vue/TS), backend (APIs/DBs), AI/ML engineering, code review, DevOps, database design, security, and architecture

ui-designer.description: UI Designer — design systems, component specs, accessibility audits (WCAG 2.1), color palettes, typography, responsive layouts, dark mode, and developer handoff documentation

qa-tester.description: QA Tester — test plans, test case generation, API testing, bug reports, performance testing, security testing (OWASP), accessibility testing, and production readiness certification

paid-media-specialist.description: Paid Media Specialist — Google Ads and Meta Ads strategy, campaign architecture, keyword research, ad copy, audience targeting, conversion tracking, budget allocation, and performance diagnosis

obsidian-memory.description: Obsidian Memory Base — AI knowledge-base integration with an Obsidian vault: ask questions saved as notes, keyword search, write notes, rebuild vault index, and report vault status

ascend-forge.description: ASCEND FORGE — system overseer, vibecoding engineer, security specialist, patch/approval/rollback owner, and enterprise upgrade mission coordinator

blacklight.description: BLACKLIGHT Security Operations — defensive OSINT, security posture analysis, policy-gated recon, audit logging, and high-risk tool blocking for enterprise safety

hermes-agent.description: Hermes Agent — multi-channel messaging orchestrator (WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord/SMS/email) with unified conversation context

turbo-quant.description: Turbo Quant — quantitative trading engine with signal generation, backtesting, risk scoring, and portfolio optimisation. Modes: MONEY/POWER/AUTO

financial-deepsearch.description: Financial DeepSearch — combines Yahoo Finance, SEC EDGAR, and DuckDuckGo for deep company research, earnings analysis, and market intelligence

course-creator.description: Course Creator — end-to-end online course automation: outlines, lesson writing (~1000 words each), quizzes, pricing tiers, 5-email launch sequences, sales copy

faceless-video.description: Faceless Video — YouTube/TikTok production pipeline: scripts, scene extraction, voiceover text, Midjourney image prompts, SEO optimisation, 30-day upload schedules

arbitrage-bot.description: Arbitrage Bot — scans Amazon/eBay/Walmart/StockX for ROI ≥ 20% price arbitrage opportunities with watchlist management and trend detection

newsletter-bot.description: Newsletter Bot — automated email newsletters with RSS curation, subscriber segmentation, HTML/text generation, and SMTP/Mailchimp delivery

appointment-setter.description: Appointment Setter — sales funnel orchestrator: prospect discovery, 5-touch outreach campaigns, pipeline tracking (prospect→contacted→qualified→appointment→closed)

web-researcher.description: Web Researcher — autonomous web research via DuckDuckGo/Wikipedia/Tavily/SerpAPI with source citations and cross-bot IPC for fact-based answers

signal-community.description: Signal Community — aggregates polymarket-trader and MiroFish signals, formats for Telegram/Discord, tracks signal performance, manages community newsletters

lead-intelligence.description: Lead Intelligence Pipeline — 4-agent system: lead-hunter (discover) → lead-scorer (rank by ICP) → deal-matcher (deal fit) → outreach-agent (personalized sequences)

company-manager.description: Company Manager — manages company information, team structure, operational workflows, and business processes for multi-client or multi-company setups

budget-tracker.description: Budget Tracker — per-agent monthly cost tracking with token usage monitoring, configurable budget caps (USD), 80% warning threshold and hard-stop enforcement

goal-alignment.description: Goal Alignment — hierarchical goal context injector: Company Mission → Project Goals → Task Context. Ensures every agent knows what to do and why.

governance.description: Governance — board-level approval gates for high-impact agent actions. Risk levels: LOW (auto-approved), MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL. Immutable audit trail.

ecom-agent.description: E-Commerce Agent — product research, AI listing copy for Shopify/Etsy, email marketing flows, Facebook/Google ad copy, and customer service reply templates

ceo-briefing.description: CEO Briefing — daily executive summary: recent tasks, agent health, pipeline movements, revenue metrics, pending actions, and system alerts compiled into a concise AI briefing

social-media-manager.description: Social Media Manager — full-pipeline content: brief intake, trend research, multi-platform content strategy, scripts, captions, AI image prompts, hashtag sets, and content packages

qualification-agent.description: Lead Qualification Agent — scores leads 0–10 on Budget/Interest/Need dimensions, flags unqualified leads, and focuses sales effort on high-value opportunities

lead-crm.description: Lead CRM — full sales pipeline management: deal stages (new→qualified→proposal→negotiation→closed), AI lead scoring 0–100, follow-up scheduling, and pipeline analytics

competitor-watch.description: Competitor Watch — competitive intelligence monitoring: competitor records, AI-powered analysis and positioning, alert system for new insights, and landscape overview

meeting-intelligence.description: Meeting Intelligence — meeting management and AI summarization: records transcripts, extracts key points/decisions/action items, generates follow-up emails to attendees

polymarket-trader.description: Polymarket Trader — prediction market trading with MiroFish swarm simulation for probability estimates, paper/live modes, risk management, and performance tracking

chatbot-builder.description: Chatbot Builder — generates complete chatbot templates for niches (fitness, recipes, dating, customer service, coaching): persona, system prompts, FAQ libraries, conversation flows, SaaS pricing tiers

content-calendar.description: Content Calendar — plans and schedules content across channels: generates topic ideas, assigns publish dates, content types, and platform targets for 30/60/90-day horizons

email-marketing.description: Email Marketing — full email marketing automation: campaign planning, list segmentation, A/B test design, drip sequences, performance analysis, and deliverability optimization

analytics-bi.description: Analytics BI — business intelligence dashboard: reads system state files to produce KPI summaries, revenue trends, pipeline health, anomaly detection, and executive-ready reports

crm-pipeline.description: CRM Pipeline — deal pipeline manager: tracks deals through stages, flags stale deals, sends follow-up reminders, calculates conversion rates and expected revenue

customer-support.description: Customer Support — support ticket triage: classifies issues (refund/bug/billing/onboarding), drafts empathetic reply templates, sets priority, and flags escalations

invoicing.description: Invoicing — generates professional invoice drafts from deal data: line items, tax calculation, totals, payment terms, and email-ready invoice copy

personal-brand.description: Personal Brand — builds complete personal brand: LinkedIn bio/headline/about, thought leadership content, speaking topics, brand voice guide, and 30-day content plan

social-scheduler.description: Social Scheduler — schedules social media posts with timestamps, tracks posting status, generates AI content drafts, and manages multi-platform queues

team-management.description: Team Management — manages team roster, assigns tasks to members, tracks workload, generates standup reports, and monitors capacity across projects

website-builder.description: Website Builder — generates complete landing page copy and structure: hero section, feature blocks, social proof, pricing tables, FAQ, and CTA sections with conversion-focused writing

workflow-builder.description: Workflow Builder — designs automation workflows: trigger→condition→action chains, saves as reusable JSON recipes, supports webhook/cron/event triggers

export-backup.description: Export & Backup — exports system state as CSV/JSON: leads, tasks, revenue, activity logs; creates dated backup archives with integrity checksums

health-check.description: Health Check — system health monitor: checks all services, verifies state file integrity, validates API keys, measures response times, and returns a grade (A/B/C/D) with remediation steps

seo-agent.description: SEO Agent — full on-page SEO: audits title/meta/headings/internal links, keyword clustering by intent, content gap analysis, schema markup suggestions, and page-by-page optimization plans

contract-drafter.description: Contract Drafter — generates professional legal documents: NDAs, SOWs, SLAs, freelance contracts, partnership agreements with variable substitution and plain-English summaries

pitch-deck-builder.description: Pitch Deck Builder — builds investor-grade pitch decks: problem/solution/market/traction/team/financials/ask slides with narrative arc, data placeholders, and design notes

ad-copy-tester.description: Ad Copy Tester — generates 3–5 variants per angle for Facebook/Google/LinkedIn ads, scores each by estimated CTR-likelihood, and outputs a structured A/B split-test plan

data-scraper.description: Data Scraper — scrapes public web data via DuckDuckGo/Tavily: LinkedIn-style profiles, G2 reviews, news articles, product listings, pricing pages; returns structured enriched datasets

email-warmup.description: Email Warmup — email deliverability advisor: checks SPF/DKIM/DMARC configuration, estimates spam scores, generates warmup sequence advice, and produces a deliverability audit report

report-generator.description: Report Generator — compiles weekly/monthly business reports from system state: revenue, pipeline, content activity, agent performance → formatted Markdown reports ready to share

customer-journey-mapper.description: Customer Journey Mapper — maps full buyer journeys: awareness→consideration→decision touchpoints, friction points, emotional states, channel mix, and prioritized improvement recommendations

api-tester.description: API Tester — generates HTTP test suites for REST APIs: validates responses, checks auth/rate limits, tests edge cases, produces Postman-style collections and security review notes

risk-analyst.description: Risk Analyst — business and project risk assessment: SWOT analysis, risk register with likelihood/impact matrix (1–5 scale), mitigation strategies, and priority action plans

recruiter.description: Recruiter — recruitment automation: CV screening, candidate outreach, and interview scheduling

follow-up-agent.description: Follow-up Agent — sends 2–5 personalised follow-ups and adapts tone based on engagement

offer-agent.description: Offer Agent — crafts a personalised pitch and offer per niche

creator-agency.description: Creator Agency — creator/personal-brand automation: content planning, scripting, and scheduling

print-on-demand.description: Print-on-Demand — merch automation for Printful, Teespring, and similar platforms

financial-tools.description: Financial Tools — invoice management, quotes, P&L, and payment reminders

ticket-system.description: Ticket System — task tracking with an immutable audit trail

org-chart.description: Org Chart — agent hierarchy and reporting-structure management

mirofish-researcher.description: MiroFish Researcher — standalone market-research agent (crowd-intelligence informed)

discord-bot.description: Discord Bot — admin control panel and notifications for the AI follow-up system over Discord

whatsapp-webhook.description: WhatsApp Webhook — receives inbound Twilio WhatsApp messages and routes them into the system

discovery.description: Discovery Bot — scans skill gaps and market opportunities, proposes new skills or workflows using AI-powered analysis; all proposals require explicit user approval before any changes

feedback-loop.description: Feedback Loop — tracks outreach message effectiveness by scoring templates based on reply/conversion outcomes, surfaces best-performing templates for reuse, and automatically updates scores from CRM status changes

lead-generator.description: Lead Generator Bot — finds local business and real estate leads via web search, generates personalised cold emails using AI, manages a JSON CRM, and schedules follow-ups automatically

scheduler-runner.description: Scheduler Runner — reads a schedules config and triggers tasks (bot start/stop, chat commands, status reports) at defined intervals or daily/weekly times; supports graceful shutdown

status-reporter.description: Status Reporter — generates compact hourly system-health summaries and delivers them via WhatsApp and Discord; aggregates bot states, trading activity, and pending improvement proposals

ai-router.description: AI Router — two-layer model routing: Ollama/Gemma/NVIDIA NIM first, Anthropic/OpenAI cloud fallback. Keeps costs low by maximising local model use.

artifacts.description: Artifacts — track, version, and manage agent outputs (code, reports, campaigns, demos) as deployable artifacts.

session-manager.description: Session Manager — persist agent task context across reboots so agents resume where they left off.

skills-manager.description: Skills Manager — 111-skill library with custom agent builder. Create, combine, and manage skill sets.
